trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: add executable permission helper tests for MVP-006 + MVP-014.
scope: Prove the default-deny role matrix (student-own, mentor-assigned, teacher program/cohort/global, admin allow, misc-admin deny) through executable unit tests exercising canAccessStudent (used by protected evidence access checks).

Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md evidence for MVP-006 + MVP-014 to reference the new executable permission tests.
known_limits: Permission tests exercise canAccessStudent through a mocked D1 interface; follow-on integration tests should validate audit-event writes and evidence-access route behavior against a real D1 instance.
next_actions: Add integration coverage for /api/evidence/:id/check-access: 401/403/404 paths plus audit-event assertions.
Add permission regression tests for export download checks and review history endpoints to ensure misc-admin narrowing is enforced consistently.
